key_observation: Uses full retrieved chunks as context. Evidence is coarse-grained (EGS=0.00), so the model must filter relevant information internally. Highest faithfulness among chunk-level systems.
Extracts the top-1 most relevant sentence(s) before answering. EGS=0.99 reflects tight evidence focus. Faithfulness -0.36 vs chunk-level baseline. Higher precision at the cost of narrower context.
Extracts the top-3 most relevant sentence(s) before answering. EGS=0.95 reflects tight evidence focus. Faithfulness -0.30 vs chunk-level baseline. Balances focus with broader coverage.
